final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media screenshot mockup of a 抖音 live-stream broadcast.

Style/medium: needs a "抖音直播截图" aesthetic — references in the spirit of TikTok / 抖音 live-stream UI design language, 2020s Chinese short-video platform visual vernacular, mobile live-broadcast screen capture style; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical, full-screen live-stream screenshot layout with typical 抖音 live UI overlays (comment feed, like animations, viewer count, host username bar)
Subject: must include a young woman resembling a graceful, ethereal Chinese female celebrity (神仙姐姐 archetype) as the live-stream host, holding up a handwritten sign facing the camera
Scene/backdrop: must include a typical indoor live-stream setup backdrop
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, soft studio-light live-broadcast atmosphere — exact light mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include the sign as a physical cardboard or paper placard held in both hands
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" written on the sign the host is holding
Constraints: must preserve 抖音 live-stream UI chrome (comment scroll, floating hearts, viewer count overlay) as part of the screenshot composition
Avoid: real celebrity likeness; avoid any identifiable real person
